20:20 â June 15, 2020
Update to the International Transfers Part
We added information on the settlement and reporting of the International Transfers FX spread revenue and clarified the branding requirements for the International Transfers product.
Electronic Transactions Volume
International Transfers Part
Section 1.4, International Transfers Financial Exchange (FX)
We added a reference to Section 4.1, Settlement of International Transfers, for information on FX spread revenue.
Section 3.1, Overview of Implementation
We updated the International Transfers Implementation Requirements, Form 9080, overview.
Section 3.2, Completing the International Transfers Implementation Requirements Form
We clarified the branding requirements for the International Transfers product.
Section 4.1, Settlement of International Transfers
We added information on the settlement and reporting of International Transfers FX spread revenue.
